title: The Demon King's Daughter Is Too Kind!! / The Demon King's Daughter Helps Too Much!!
overview: Demon King Ahriman wants to take over the world but his daughter Doux is too kind and making it difficult.

title: The Demon King's Daughter Must Shrewdly Oppress the Humans!! / The Demon King's Advisor Teaches Too Well!!
overview: Jahi tries to get Doux to hate humans by making her meet a demon hunter.

title: Searching for a Familiar Is Too Difficult!! / The Pairika Is Too Sexy!!
overview: Jahi tries to assist Doux in getting a familiar and Doux gains a new teacher.

title: Santa Is Handing Out Too Many Presents!! / The Demon King's Familiar Loves Humans Too Much!!
overview: Jahi comes up with a plan to capture Santa Claus but Doux just wants to help Santa hand out presents.

title: The Divine Messenger Is Too Much Trouble!! / The Divine Messenger (The Real One) Is Too Hot-Headed!!
overview: Jahi has a new plan to get Doux to become more demon like, but a divine messenger gets in the way.

title: The Demon King's Daughter Is Trying to Change Her Image Too Much!! / XXX Is Too Perfect a Job for a Pairika!!
overview: Jahi teaches Doux how to transform and Thaiti tries to find the perfect job.

title: The Monsters of Terror Look Too Ugly!! / The Spirit Tower Is Just Too Exciting!! / The Demon King's Attendant Thinks Too Much!!
overview: Doux encounters some monsters of terror and Doux, the demon king, and Jahi go on vacation.

title: The Demon King's Attendant Is Too Depressed!! / The Demon King's Attendant Is Too Tired!!
overview: Jahi is dealing with a few problems and Doux tries to help.

title: The Previous Demon King Is Too Scary!! / The Previous Demon King Is Too Much of a Doting Grandpa!!
overview: The previous demon king, who is known to be scary, comes to visit. Is he immune to Doux's charms?

title: The Witches' Potions Work Way Too Good!! / The Hero Is Just Too Unreliable!!
overview: Jahi asks a witch to make a potion to turn Doux evil and later on, Doux runs into a hero.

title: The Demon King's Wife Loves Her Daughter Too Much!! / The Face Reveal Ceremony Is Too Soon!!
overview: Doux's face reveal ceremony is coming soon and she gets a surprise visitor.

title: The Face Reveal Ceremony Is Too Lively!! / The Future Demon King Is Too Kind!!
overview: Doux has her big Face Reveal Ceremony.
